EXCLUSIVE: Banzai To Snap OpenReel Digital Video Creation Platform For $19.6 Million
data.description: Banzai International, Inc (NASDAQ: BNZI) announced acquiring OpenReel for $19.6 million in shares. OpenReel's solution allows rapid creation of branded video content.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: MIRA Pharmaceuticals Validates Ketamir-2's Safety Profile, Paving Way For Human Trials In Neuropathic Pain
data.description: MIRA Pharmaceuticals completes preclinical safety studies for Ketamir-2, confirming no adverse findings as it targets an Investigational New Drug submission by late 2024.
